name: openui
description: OpenUI is a high-concept landing-page workflow for Codex with repo AGENTS.md seeding, mandatory design.md planning, and multi-variant quality gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan with design.md, then build high-concept landing pages.
interface.longDescription: OpenUI ensures repo-level AGENTS.md guidance exists, resolves all landing page inputs first, writes a concrete design.md with one section and composition contract per variant, then implements each page from that plan with batch quality gates for larger variant sets.
defaultPrompt: Create three distinct landing page variants.
Write design.md first, then build the page.
